title: Marmousi Multi-scale FWI Dry-run Baseline
summary: A dry-run planning record for Marmousi-style multi-scale FWI before enabling any real CUDA/MPI backend.
assumptions: the experiment is rendered as a dry-run JobSpec only
loss curves and model artifacts are expected outputs but are not produced by v0.3

parameter_advice.niter: Use a small iteration count for the first dry-run plan and expand only after validation.
parameter_advice.gpu_count: Keep GPU requests explicit in the spec even though v0.3 does not allocate hardware.
